append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.title: Append Empty A4 Page to PDF
append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, add a blank page, resize it to A4 dimensions, and save the updated document.

insert-blank-page-at-index-three.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Position in PDF
insert-blank-page-at-index-three.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page at position 3 using the PageCollection.Insert method, and save the updated document.

copy-page-size-insert-new-page.title: Insert New Page with Same Size as Page 2
copy-page-size-insert-new-page.description: Demonstrates how to read the dimensions of page 2 in a PDF and insert an empty page at position 5 using the same size. Utilizes Aspose.Pdf to manipulate page collections and save the result.

add-multiple-empty-pages-sequentially.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages Sequentially
add-multiple-empty-pages-sequentially.description: Demonstrates how to add a series of blank pages to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf by iterating over a list of page counts and respecting the evaluation mode page limit.

read-pdf-page-dimensions.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
read-pdf-page-dimensions.description: Loads a PDF document and logs the width and height of each page to the console.

resize-pdf-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-pdf-page-to-letter-size.description: Loads a PDF, verifies it has at least seven pages, and resizes page 7 to Letter dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5
resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its PageCollection, resize each page to A5 dimensions, and save the modified document.

rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees-clockwise.title: Rotate Fourth Page 90 Degrees Clockwise
rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees-clockwise.description: Demonstrates how to rotate the fourth page of a PDF document 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf's Rotate property and then save the modified file.

convert-odd-pages-landscape-to-portrait.title: Convert Odd Pages from Landscape to Portrait
convert-odd-pages-landscape-to-portrait.description: Shows how to change the orientation of odd‑numbered PDF pages from landscape to portrait by swapping their MediaBox dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

move-page-9-to-first-position.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
move-page-9-to-first-position.description: Shows how to reposition the ninth page of a PDF to the first position by inserting it at the new index and deleting the original using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using a Custom Sequence
reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.description: Shows how to reorder the pages of a PDF by providing a custom integer array that defines the new page order and then saving the reordered document with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the last three pages, and save the modified document.

delete-page-range-from-pdf.title: Delete Page Range from PDF
delete-page-range-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove pages 5 through 10 from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Delete method with an integer array.

insert-empty-page-custom-size.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size at Beginning of PDF
insert-empty-page-custom-size.description: Demonstrates how to add a blank page with specific dimensions (200 × 300 points) as the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

append-page-to-pdf.title: Append a Page from One PDF to Another
append-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, copy the first page from the source document, append it to the end of the target document, and save the combined PDF.

duplicate-third-page-pdf.title: Duplicate Third Page in PDF
duplicate-third-page-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to duplicate the third page of a PDF document and insert the copy immediately after the original using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF, rotate each page by 180° clockwise, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-pages-to-landscape.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, swap the MediaBox width and height using SetPageSize, and save the document so all pages become landscape orientation.

insert-blank-page-after-each-pdf-page.title: Insert Blank Page After Each PDF Page
insert-blank-page-after-each-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert a blank page after every existing page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, doubling the total page count.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, rotates odd‑numbered pages 90° while leaving even pages unchanged, and saves the modified document.

export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads each page's width and height, and writes the page number and dimensions to a CSV file for external analysis.

insert-page-from-another-pdf-at-index-tw.title: Insert Page from Another PDF at Specific Index
insert-page-from-another-pdf-at-index-tw.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from a source PDF into a target PDF at position 2 while preserving the original page size and rotation using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the first page size to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.description: Demonstrates how to rotate each page of a PDF 90 degrees clockwise while iterating from the last page to the first using Aspose.Pdf.

move-pages-3-6-to-end.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
move-pages-3-6-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to relocate pages 3 through 6 of a PDF to the document's end using Aspose.Pdf in a single operation.

copy-mediabox-page-8-to-12.title: Copy MediaBox from Page 8 to Page 12
copy-mediabox-page-8-to-12.description: Demonstrates how to read the MediaBox rectangle from one PDF page and apply it to another page using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring both pages share the same dimensions.

insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, calculate the midpoint page index, and batch insert ten blank pages before saving the document.

resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and resize only pages wider than 600 points to standard A4 size while leaving narrower pages unchanged.

delete-pdf-pages-from-config.title: Delete PDF Pages Based on Config File
delete-pdf-pages-from-config.description: Demonstrates reading a list of page numbers from an external text file and deleting those pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-descending.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
reorder-pdf-pages-descending.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract its pages, sort them in descending numeric order, and save the reordered document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.title: Convert PDF Pages to Portrait Orientation
convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, examines each page's MediaBox, and swaps width and height for landscape pages so that all pages become portrait before saving the document.

rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, rotate pages whose number is divisible by three, and save the modified document.

delete-first-page-from-pdf.title: Delete First Page from PDF Document
delete-first-page-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the first page, and save the modified document.

resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.description: Shows how to find the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize all pages to that size using Aspose.Pdf.

reset-page-rotation.title: Reset Page Rotation to Original Orientation
reset-page-rotation.description: Shows how to load a PDF, reset a page's rotation to its original (non‑rotated) state, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.title: Extract Pages, Resize to A4, and Reinsert at New Position
extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract a range of pages from a PDF, change each page size to A4, remove the original pages, and insert the modified pages at a different position using Aspose.Pdf.

move-even-pages-to-end-of-pdf.title: Move Even Pages to End of PDF
move-even-pages-to-end-of-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to reorder a PDF by extracting even‑numbered pages and appending them to the end while preserving their original order using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template-size.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating individual pages using angles defined in a dictionary, and saving the modified document.

add-transparent-separator-page-to-pdf.title: Add Transparent Separator Page to PDF
add-transparent-separator-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to append an empty page to a PDF and set its background to transparent using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-last-page-from-pdfs.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
delete-last-page-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory, remove the last page of each document using Aspose.Pdf, and save the modified files back to disk.

move-pdf-page-preserve-size-rotation.title: Move PDF Page While Preserving Size and Rotation
move-pdf-page-preserve-size-rotation.description: Demonstrates moving a page from one PDF document to another with Aspose.Pdf while keeping its original dimensions and orientation intact.

crop-pdf-page-media-box.title: Crop PDF Page by Setting MediaBox
crop-pdf-page-media-box.description: Shows how to modify a page's MediaBox to define a custom cropping region without altering the page content.

resize-pdf-pages-fixed-width.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width While Preserving Aspect Ratio
resize-pdf-pages-fixed-width.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and resizes it to a target width of 800 points while maintaining the original aspect ratio, then saves the modified document.

delete-pages-from-pdf-using-text-file.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using a Text File
delete-pages-from-pdf-using-text-file.description: Loads a PDF, reads a list of page numbers from a text file, validates them, deletes the specified pages, and saves the result.

reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape First)
reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.description: Shows how to load a PDF, separate landscape and portrait pages, and create a new PDF with all landscape pages first followed by portrait pages using Aspose.Pdf.

add-blank-front-matter-page-with-custom-.title: Add Blank Front-Matter Page with Custom Label to PDF
add-blank-front-matter-page-with-custom-.description: Loads an existing PDF, inserts a blank page at the beginning, and assigns a custom page label "i" (without automatic numbering) to serve as front‑matter numbering.

resize-pdf-pages-to-printable-area.title: Resize PDF Pages to Printable Area
resize-pdf-pages-to-printable-area.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to a specific printable size (595 × 842 points) while scaling the content proportionally using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-empty-page-custom-size__v2.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size into PDF
insert-empty-page-custom-size__v2.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, add a blank page, set its width and height from user input, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match a Template
resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-header-to-first-pdf-page.title: Add Text Header to First PDF Page
add-text-header-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a text header to the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configuring the header margin and styling the text.

add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.title: Add HTML Header with CSS to First Three PDF Pages
add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert an HTML‑styled header, including embedded CSS, on the first three pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Scaled Image Footer to Each PDF Page
add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a footer image on every page of a PDF, scaling it to a fraction of the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-footer-with-opacity-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Image Footer with Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-footer-with-opacity-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to add an image footer with 30% opacity to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Generation Date Footer to PDF Pages
add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a text footer with the current date on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-repeating-text-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Repeating Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-repeating-text-watermark.description: Shows how to overlay a semi‑transparent, diagonal repeating text watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent image watermark, rotated 45°, scaled to half the page size and centered on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.title: Add Image Watermark with Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with 20% opacity, center it on each page, apply it as a background watermark, and save the modified document.

add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Repeating Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its pages, and tile a semi‑transparent image stamp in a grid pattern to create a repeated watermark on each page.

add-year-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Year-Based Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-year-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a TextStamp that includes the current year, and apply it as a semi‑transparent background watermark on each page.

add-curved-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Curved Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-curved-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place a repeated text watermark that follows a quadratic Bezier curve across each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-to-p.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-to-p.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent text watermark with an outline to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.title: Add LightGray Background to All PDF Pages
add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, set a LightGray background color for branding, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-page-background-transparent.title: Set PDF Page Background to Transparent
set-pdf-page-background-transparent.description: Demonstrates how to make each page of a PDF have a transparent background using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the modified document.

set-pdf-page-background-color.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using RGB Values
set-pdf-page-background-color.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a brand color from RGB components, apply it as the background for each page, and save the modified document.

set-page-background-cmyk.title: Set Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
set-page-background-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a CMYK color, apply it as the background for each page, and save the updated document.

set-pdf-page-background-hsl.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
set-pdf-page-background-hsl.description: Demonstrates how to convert HSL color values to an Aspose.Pdf.Color and apply the resulting color as the background for every page in a PDF document.

apply-theme-background-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Theme-Based Background Color to PDF Pages
apply-theme-background-to-pdf-pages.description: The example reads a theme name from a JSON configuration file, maps it to an Aspose.Pdf.Color, and sets that color as the background for every page in a PDF document.

alternating-page-background-colors.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
alternating-page-background-colors.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, assign LightGray to even pages and White to odd pages as background colors, and save the modified document.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a centered page number stamp starting at 1 on every page of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-roman-numeral-page-numbers-to-intro-.title: Add Roman Numeral Page Numbers to Introductory PDF Pages
add-roman-numeral-page-numbers-to-intro-.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a PageNumberStamp configured for uppercase Roman numerals to a set of introductory pages, and save the updated document.

add-chapter-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Insert Chapter-Numbered Page Stamps in PDF
add-chapter-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers with a custom "Chapter" prefix to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-zero-padded-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Zero‑Padded Page Numbers to PDF
add-zero-padded-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp with a format that pads single‑digit page numbers with a leading zero, applies the stamp to every page, and saves the modified document.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Page Numbers (Page X of Y) to PDF
add-page-numbers-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a PageNumberStamp with a custom "Page # of #" format, apply it to every page, and save the result.

add-page-numbers-with-custom-separator.title: Add Page Numbers with '/' Separator to PDF
add-page-numbers-with-custom-separator.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and adds a page number stamp formatted as "current/total" at the bottom center, then saves the modified document.

add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Superscript Page Numbers to PDF Pages
add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp with a smaller font to simulate superscript, places it at the bottom‑right of each page, and saves the modified document.

add-page-numbers-arial-font-pdf.title: Add Page Numbers with Arial Font to PDF
add-page-numbers-arial-font-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert sequential page numbers on each PDF page using a custom Arial font at 14 points with Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-numbers-with-custom-ttf-font.title: Add Page Numbers Using Custom TTF Font
add-page-numbers-with-custom-ttf-font.description: Loads a PDF, embeds an external TrueType font, and adds page numbers to each page using a PageNumberStamp configured with the custom font.

add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Odd PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on odd pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp and save the result.

add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Even PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on even pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf in C#.

add-bates-numbering-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bates Numbering Stamp to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a Bates numbering stamp that starts at 1000 and adds a dash suffix on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.title: Add Bates Numbering with Custom Prefix and Suffix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.description: Demonstrates how to apply Bates numbering to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a custom prefix "DOC" and suffix "-2026" for version tracking.

add-bates-numbering-with-alphanumeric-pr.title: Add Bates Numbering with Alphanumeric Prefix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-alphanumeric-pr.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply Bates numbering that includes an alphanumeric prefix, and save the updated document.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply year‑based Bates numbering in the format "2026-####" to every page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-bates-numbering-increment-5.title: Batch Add Bates Numbering to PDFs with Increment of 5
batch-add-bates-numbering-increment-5.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, adds Bates numbering to every page where the counter increases by 5 for each subsequent page, and saves the processed files to an output folder.

replace-bates-numbering-in-pdf.title: Replace Bates Numbering in PDF
replace-bates-numbering-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete any existing Bates numbering artifacts from all pages of a PDF and then add a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-bates-numbering-from-selected-pdf.title: Remove Bates Numbering from Selected PDF Pages
remove-bates-numbering-from-selected-pdf.description: Shows how to delete Bates numbering artifacts from specific pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, preserving numbering on other pages.

replace-pdf-headers-footers.title: Replace PDF Headers and Footers
replace-pdf-headers-footers.description: Demonstrates how to remove existing headers and footers from each page of a PDF and add new custom header and footer content using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-page-count.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and obtain the total number of pages without saving the document.

read-pdf-page-dimensions__v2.title: Read PDF Page Width and Height
read-pdf-page-dimensions__v2.description: Loads a PDF file, iterates through each page, and logs the page's width and height in points using Aspose.Pdf.

adjust-pdf-bleedbox-for-printer-specs.title: Adjust PDF BleedBox for Printer Specifications
adjust-pdf-bleedbox-for-printer-specs.description: Shows how to read each page's BleedBox (or fall back to MediaBox), expand it by a fixed amount, and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-trimbox-values-after-cropping.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values After Cropping PDF Pages
retrieve-trimbox-values-after-cropping.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, optionally set a new CropBox, and read the TrimBox of each page to verify the content area.

set-cropbox-trim-margins-pdf-pages.title: Set CropBox to Trim Margins on PDF Pages
set-cropbox-trim-margins-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to adjust each page's CropBox in a PDF to remove margins by inseting from the MediaBox using Aspose.Pdf.

extend-bleedbox-beyond-cropbox.title: Extend BleedBox Beyond CropBox in PDF
extend-bleedbox-beyond-cropbox.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, read each page's CropBox, create a BleedBox that extends 5 points beyond it on all sides, assign it to the page, and save the modified document.

trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages
trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to remove surrounding white space from each PDF page by detecting blank pages and setting the TrimBox to the content bounding box using Aspose.Pdf.

trim-white-space-per-page-tolerance.title: Trim White Space with Per-Page Pixel Tolerance
trim-white-space-per-page-tolerance.description: Demonstrates how to trim the white margins of each PDF page using a custom pixel tolerance that is converted to PDF points. The example handles per‑page tolerance values and skips blank pages.

crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF and adjust each page's CropBox so the content fits a fixed 4:3 aspect ratio using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Logo Image to PDF Pages
add-header-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add a company logo as an image stamp aligned to the left header of each page, and save the modified document.

add-bold-section-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bold Section Header to PDF Pages
add-bold-section-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to loop through each page of a PDF and insert a centered, bold, uppercase header using Aspose.Pdf.
